etymology.description: 年(年) (nián, "year") + 級(級) (jí, "level; grade") = refers to a level within an academic year
etymology.interpretation: In an academic context, 年級(年級) (niánjí) denotes a specific grade or year level within the educational system. It combines the concept of the calendar year with the idea of a hierarchical level of study, designating a student's progression through their education.

examples.chinese: 她上三年级(她上三年級)。
examples.english: She is in the third grade.

examples.chinese: 考试成绩公布后(考試成績公布後)，他顺利升入高年级(他順利升入高年級)。
examples.pinyin: Kǎoshì chéngjī gōngbù hòu, tā shùnlì shēngrù gāo niánjí.
examples.english: After the exam scores were released, he was successfully promoted to a higher grade.

examples.chinese: 新学期开始后(新學期開始後)，每个年级都有新同学加入(每個年級都有新同學加入)。
examples.pinyin: Xīn xuéqī kāishǐ hòu, měi gè niánjí dōu yǒu xīn tóngxué jiārù.
examples.english: After the new term began, each grade welcomed new classmates.
